ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the card */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set the card belongs to */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number within the set */,
  "print_run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the print run the card belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the card (e.g., mint, near-mint, good) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the card (e.g., common, rare, ultra-rare) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the card */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* Provenance of the card (e.g., signed, authenticated) */,
  "card_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of card (e.g., rookie, parallel, autographed) */,
  "card_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the card image */,
  "issue_year" INTEGER /* Year the card was issued */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number for limited edition cards */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the card details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_card_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_type_id") REFERENCES card_types ("card_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_print_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("print_run_id") REFERENCES print_runs ("print_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set */,
  "set_type" TEXT /* Type of the set (e.g., base, insert, parallel) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the set */,
  "set_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the set image */,
  "set_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the set */,
  "total_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of cards in the set */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the set details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player image */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "player_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "player_biography" TEXT /* Biography of the player */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NHL, NFL) */,
  "team_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the team image */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Foundation date of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "print_runs" (
  "print_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each print run */,
  "print_run_name" TEXT /* Name of the print run */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set the print run belongs to */,
  "print_run_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the print run image */,
  "print_run_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the print run */,
  "print_run_quantity" INTEGER /* Total number of cards in the print run */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the print run details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("print_run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "collection_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the collection image */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the collection */,
  "collection_value" REAL /* Total value of the collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the collection details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_cards" (
  "collection_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection-card relationship */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the card */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the card was acquired */,
  "acquisition_price" REAL /* Price at which the card was acquired */,
  "acquisition_source" TEXT /* Source from which the card was acquired */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the collection-card relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_cards_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_types" (
  "card_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card type */,
  "card_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the card type (e.g., rookie, parallel, autographed) */,
  "card_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the card type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_type_id")
)
